There's a warm, glowing light. Fully restore the party?
The party's HP and MP has been fully restored!
A door of light. You're not sure how to open it.
A door of light. You're not sure how to open it.
I've been playing along with Steel up to this point, but no more!
I'm made of flesh and blood! I need breaks!
You're going to teach him a lesson, right? Good! If you take him
down, I'll let you have my collection!
Nice one! Seeing Steel get his ass handed to him felt so good!
But some dangerous guys came by later to hunt him down.
I'm going to shove off too. Here, just like I promised.
I checked the machines here. They're all incredibly advanced, but...
Most of them don't have power sources anymore. Man, this mountain
of treasure's really making me itch.
Maybe it's not a country but a ship. There's a lot of data here that
implies it should be able to move.
Well, not that it'll be going anywhere without a proper power source.
There's no way to prove my theory right now.
He sold off my friends! Shit! Give them back! Where'd you sell
